semantic.role: CLI utility module that generates a list of document language choices for interactive configuration prompts, including a separator for high-capacity languages.
responsibilities: Define the DocumentLanguageChoice interface for representing a selectable language option in a CLI prompt.
Export the sentinel value HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR_VALUE for use as a UI separator marker.
Export the visible separator label text HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR.
Export the DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE_QUALITY_NOTE constant (currently empty) for optional quality advisories.
Export getDocumentLanguageChoices function that accepts selected languages and returns a full list of language choice objects with selection state.
outOfScope: User input handling beyond building choice options
invariants: Must remain free of any persistence, pipeline, or LLM logic (per cli-entrypoint-separation rule).
Must only provide data structure definitions and a pure function to transform language lists into choice objects.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, reusable definition of document language choices for CLI prompts, ensuring consistent language selection across the interactive workflow.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes evident in this file's source; the referenced recent git intent (credential store hardening and summarization pipeline optimization) does not apply to this module.

publicSurface.description: Interface for a language option item used in CLI prompts, providing title, value, and optional selection/disabled state.
Sentinel string value representing a UI separator for high-capacity languages in the language choice list.
Human-readable label text for the separator line displayed between standard and high-capacity language groups.
Constant note (currently empty) that can be used to display a quality or capability advisory alongside the language list.
Pure function that builds a full array of DocumentLanguageChoice objects from default and high-capacity language lists, marking selected items based on the input array of selected languages.
